## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120]
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11]
- Version: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
